overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City district at night. The character crosses a wet intersection and proceeds along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways, passing street vendors and storefronts with vibrant holographic advertisements.

events.description: begins crossing the yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection with a companion

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the ego character across the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
tall skyscrapers with bright neon advertisements and holograms
elevated highway structure with yellow lighting
large advertisement with COLA text and graphic
reflective wet asphalt surface mirroring neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-slicked urban intersection at night, with the ego character and a companion beginning to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background beneath an elevated highway, while holographic billboards illuminate the wet pavement with colorful reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level beneath elevated highway with nightclub entrance

events.description: turns right to walk along the street
moves from open intersection to street sidewalk beside buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb passing by a nightclub

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead of ego character

entered.detail: building with prominent red neon NO FUTURE signage
concrete dividers along the road edge
wet asphalt street with lane markings

segments.scene_description: Turning right from the intersection, the ego walks along a street beneath an elevated highway, passing the 'No Future' nightclub with its distinctive red neon signage. The companion walks ahead as they move along the concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the wet asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with street food vendor

events.description: approaches and passes Japanese-style food stall
enters covered area with overhead purple neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor stall in a covered walkway

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead toward the food stall
vendor standing behind the counter of the food stall

entered.detail: small eatery with teal lighting and menu displays
staircase leading up to elevated structure
long continuous purple neon tube running along ceiling

segments.scene_description: The ego approaches a Japanese-style food stall with teal underlighting, passing beneath the shelter of an elevated highway. A vendor stands at the stall while the companion continues ahead. The environment transitions into a covered walkway illuminated by a continuous purple neon strip running overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with laundromat and neon lighting

events.description: passes by the Wash It Up laundromat entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway passing commercial establishments

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated Wash It Up signage and visible washing machines
row of automated vending units against the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered corridor, the ego passes a laundromat with illuminated signage on the left and vending machines along the right wall. The purple neon lighting continues overhead as the walkway narrows, with the companion maintaining a steady pace ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching stairway to upper level

events.description: nears the end of the covered corridor with escalator visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stairway at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: moving staircase leading to upper level with green lighting
huge advertisement showing a man in suit with text
arched passage at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the end of the covered walkway, where an escalator with green lighting leads upward. A large political billboard appears on the left wall as the corridor narrows toward an arched tunnel entrance, with the purple neon strip now running along the right side of the ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban intersection into the narrowing confines of a neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins with the character and a companion crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards that cast colorful reflections on the wet pavement. As they turn right, the scene shifts along a concrete barrier beneath an elevated highway, passing the red neon signage of the No Future nightclub. The camera then follows them past a teal-lit Japanese food stall before the environment transitions into a covered walkway defined by a continuous overhead purple neon strip. Finally, the path narrows past a laundromat and vending machines, leading toward a green-lit escalator and a political billboard at the mouth of an arched tunnel.
